inline_comments.message:
It seems this was the wrong fix. 
It breaks the logic.
If condition is false then return false.
This fix says if Condition is true return false.  
Can you please fix. 
Just wanted to update for future fixes that original logic must be the same.  

Should be 

if (!columnValue.equals(conditionValue))

Probably a better idea to have other reviewers in future, but this was a tough one to see at first glance.
